CREATE TABLE my_table (id INT, data STRING);
INSERT INTO my_table VALUES (1, 'Test Data 1'), (2, 'Test Data 2');
SELECT * FROM my_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM my_table WHERE data LIKE 'Test%');
INSERT INTO my_table (id, data) SELECT 3, gz_file_open('path/anotherfile.n3.gz') WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_table WHERE id = 3);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM my_table WHERE data IN (SELECT gz_file_open('path/myfile.n3.gz'));
WITH gz_data AS (SELECT gz_file_open('path/myfile.n3.gz') AS content) SELECT * FROM gz_data;
DB.DBA.TTLP_MT (gz_file_open('path/myfile.n3.gz'), 'base uri', 'graph uri', 255) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM my_table WHERE id = 1);
